notes: Kvarts (Кварц) — Russian quartz-reinforced ceramic composite armor. Uses fused silica/quartz in resin matrix within cast steel turret cavity. RHAe ~1.9-2.3 per mm vs KE. Applied in T-72B, T-80U, T-90 turret arrays. Better than textolite but more expensive. Combines ceramic hardness with composite toughness.

source.reference: Open-source Russian armor analysis, T-72B/T-90 publications
source.methodology: RHAe estimated from T-72B/T-90 reported protection levels, factoring composite cavity dimensions in cast turret armor arrays.
